output: Batch 3 complete. Added `_CLASSIFIER_TOOL` and `_CLASSIFIER_SYSTEM_PROMPT` at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:22-58`, and added the async `_classify_confirmation` wrapper at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:183-228`. The wrapper uses `self._classifier_client.messages.create(...)` with forced tool use, preserves fail-closed keyword fallback when the client is missing, when the API raises, when the response lacks a valid tool-use payload, and when the classifier returns an unknown value. Verification passed for `tests/test_admin_payments.py` and for the full repository suite.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added module-level classifier constants `_CLASSIFIER_TOOL` and `_CLASSIFIER_SYSTEM_PROMPT` at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:22-58`. Added async instance method `_classify_confirmation` at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:183-228` returning `(classification, clarification_reply)`. Verified the method returns `(keyword_result, None)` when `self._classifier_client` is `None`, calls `self._classifier_client.messages.create(...)` with `model=self._classifier_model`, `max_tokens=256`, `system=_CLASSIFIER_SYSTEM_PROMPT`, `tools=[_CLASSIFIER_TOOL]`, `tool_choice={"type": "tool", "name": "classify_payment_reply"}`, and `messages=[{"role": "user", "content": content or ""}]`, logs and falls back to keywords on exception with `exc_info=True`, falls back on missing or malformed tool-use input, falls back on unknown classification strings, and maps `confirmed -> positive`, `not_received -> negative`, `unclear -> ambiguous` while propagating a non-empty `reply` string. Verification: `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py --tb=no -q --no-header` passed; `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with `201 passed, 4 warnings`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. The new async `_classify_confirmation` method at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:183-228` calls `self._classifier_client.messages.create(...)` with `tools=[_CLASSIFIER_TOOL]` and `tool_choice={"type": "tool", "name": "classify_payment_reply"}`; returns `(keyword_result, None)` when the client is `None`; logs a warning with `exc_info=True` and falls back to keywords on exceptions; falls back to keywords on missing or malformed tool-use payloads and unknown classification values; maps `confirmed -> positive`, `not_received -> negative`, and `unclear -> ambiguous`; and propagates a non-empty `reply` string when present.
